name: lyricsviewer
description: Choir-aware lyrics presentation for extended displays

scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run electron:compile
scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron ."
scripts.postinstall: npx electron-rebuild --only better-sqlite3 && npm rebuild vosk ffi-napi ref-napi

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: LyricsViewer listens to the choir to automatically advance lyrics on screen.
